frontier: F3 substitution-neighborhood bridges v2 — higher-order motifs
claim_layer: L2 relative/structural only; no value claim; no licence earned (Art. XV)

within_script_leg.label_null_holm_3x2: all 6 tests p_holm = 0.006 (SIGNIFICANT vs freq-matched label null)
within_script_leg.degree_preserving_null: PASS all 4 families (p = 0.005; obs > null p95)

wrong_language_shuffle_control.status: FAIL for ALL families INCLUDING FLAT
wrong_language_shuffle_control.interpretation: the within-script C-axis is substantially ORDER-FREE (word-composition/co-occurrence) signal; attribution to sequential substitution structure specifically is NOT supported; new constraint on the F1/C_AUDIT interpretation (their label-null significance stands; the mechanism attribution weakens). Shuffle is also weakly destructive for short words (18% L=2, 35% L=3 types).

cross_script_leg.family: MF_A_trigram (MF_B/MF_C SOURCE_BLOCKED: cog lists carry no series/site metadata)

posthoc_order_destruction.reading: cross-script signal COLLAPSES under within-word shuffle -> genuinely sequential motif geometry

cross_script_leg.note: only the anchor-seeded M1 (LOO) carries the cross-script recovery; unsupervised M2/M3 do not survive on KNOWN — the bridge works in SEEDED mode only

la_leg.pair: REAL_LAsilver_vs_LBdamos, GT = AB shape-homomorphic PROPOSAL (not ground truth)

posthoc_order_destruction.reading: LA<->LB signal largely SURVIVES order destruction -> substantially composition/co-occurrence-driven, unlike KNOWN; the sequential-motif component is the smaller part (0.157 vs 0.118)

caps: first Holm-surviving REAL-pair alignment in this channel's history, but it is a CONSISTENCY test of the assumed homomorphic seed set (M1-LOO uses the 50 other proposed pairs as anchors), not independent recovery
43/51 signs still misalign; capped <= 0.75 as a signal (truth-layer); earns NO transfer licence

composition-driven component overlaps in spirit with the previously NULL raw-distribution channel; prior NULLs were unsupervised/differently graded — no contradiction, but interpretive weight shifts accordingly

epoch_verdict.summary: Higher-order trigram-frame motif geometry does NOT improve within-script class recovery over the flat channel, but RESTORES cross-script power the flat bridge lacked: first Holm-surviving KNOWN LB<->Cypriot recovery (order-dependent, non-frequency) and first Holm-surviving LA<->LB homomorphy-consistency signal (largely order-free). New adversarial constraint: the within-script C-axis is substantially composition-driven.

search_receipt.within_tests: 3 families x 2 axes Holm (label null) + 4x degree nulls + 1 shuffle control + 6 bootstrap CIs + 6 LOSO folds
search_receipt.cross_tests: 2 pairs x 4 methods x 3 metrics (Holm-12 per pair) + LA pair (Holm-12)

effective_n.info_note: KNOWN exact 7/47 vs chance 1/47; LA 8/51; addressable identity <= log2(47) ~ 5.6 bits/sign; channel supplies a fraction

compliance: Art XXII: prereg frozen+hashed before run; positive control gated first; verdicts mechanical per frozen rules; post-hoc analyses declared as such and verdict-neutral; append-only.
